languages.text: "Этот мир не спасти — ересь исходит из самих недр. Я приказываю незамедлительно начать уничтожение тассерция и объявляю планете экстерминатус. У Администратума будет время забрать отсюда свое имущество, а после Тассеру очистит пламя".

"This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order the immediate destruction of all thassertium, and declare Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which, Thassera will be cleansed by fire."
languages.original_text: "Этот мир не спасти — ересь исходит из самих недр. Я приказываю незамедлительно начать уничтожение тассерция и объявляю планете экстерминатус. У Администратума будет время забрать отсюда свое имущество, а после Тассеру очистит пламя".

traits.locale_text: "This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order thassertium destruction to commence immediately, and declare an Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

"This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order thassertium destruction to commence immediately, and declare an Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

languages.text: “这个世界已经无可救药了，到处散发着异端邪说的味道。我在此命令，立刻销毁所有塔瑟拉水晶，对这颗行星签发灭绝令。我会给内政部足够的时间，让他们撤走他们的财产。等撤离结束后，就用烈焰净化整个塔瑟拉吧。”
languages.original_text: "This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order the immediate destruction of all thassertium, and declare Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which, Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

traits.locale_text: “这个世界已经无可救药了，到处散发着异端邪说的味道。我在此命令，立刻销毁所有塔瑟拉水晶，对这颗行星签发灭绝令。我会给内政部足够的时间，让他们撤走他们的财产。等撤离结束后，就用烈焰净化整个塔瑟拉吧。”

languages.text: 「この惑星はもはや救いようがない。奥底から異端が染み出している。よって、直ちに全てのタッセリウムを破壊し、惑星に〈究極浄化〉を宣告する。帝国行政局には所有物の撤収の時間を与えるが、その後、タッセーラは火によって浄化されるだろう」
languages.original_text: "This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order the immediate destruction of all thassertium, and declare Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which, Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

traits.locale_text: 「この惑星はもはや救いようがない。奥底から異端が染み出している。よって、直ちに全てのタッセリウムを破壊し、惑星に〈究極浄化〉を宣告する。帝国行政局には所有物の撤収の時間を与えるが、その後、タッセーラは火によって浄化されるだろう」

languages.text: «Este mundo ya no tiene salvación. Sus entrañas mismas exudan herejía. Ordeno la destrucción inmediata de todo el thassertio y declaro Exterminatus sobre el planeta. El Administratum dispondrá de un tiempo prudencial para evacuar sus propiedades, y después Thassera será purificada a fuego».
languages.original_text: "This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order the immediate destruction of all thassertium, and declare Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which, Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

traits.locale_text: «Este mundo ya no tiene salvación. Sus entrañas mismas exudan herejía. Ordeno la destrucción inmediata de todo el thassertio y declaro Exterminatus sobre el planeta. El Administratum dispondrá de un tiempo prudencial para evacuar sus propiedades, y después Thassera será purificada a fuego».

languages.text: "Bu dünya kurtarılamaz. Bağırsaklarından bile kâfirlik sızıyor. Tüm tasertiyumun derhâl yok edilmesini emrediyor ve gezegen için Eksterminatus ilanında bulunuyorum. Administratum'a mülklerini boşaltması için zaman tanınacak ve sonrasında Thassera, ateşle arındırılacak."
languages.original_text: "This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order the immediate destruction of all thassertium, and declare Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which, Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

traits.locale_text: "Bu dünya kurtarılamaz. Bağırsaklarından bile kâfirlik sızıyor. Tüm tasertiyumun derhâl yok edilmesini emrediyor ve gezegen için Eksterminatus ilanında bulunuyorum. Administratum'a mülklerini boşaltması için zaman tanınacak ve sonrasında Thassera, ateşle arındırılacak."

languages.text: « Plus rien ne pourra sauver ce monde. L'hérésie a eu raison de ses entrailles. J'ordonne donc la destruction immédiate de tout son thassertium et condamne la planète à l'Exterminatus. Il sera laissé à l'Administratum le temps nécessaire pour évacuer sa propriété, après quoi Thassera sera purifiée par les flammes. »
languages.original_text: "This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order the immediate destruction of all thassertium, and declare Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which, Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

traits.locale_text: « Plus rien ne pourra sauver ce monde. L'hérésie a eu raison de ses entrailles. J'ordonne donc la destruction immédiate de tout son thassertium et condamne la planète à l'Exterminatus. Il sera laissé à l'Administratum le temps nécessaire pour évacuer sa propriété, après quoi Thassera sera purifiée par les flammes. »

languages.text: "Diese Welt kann nicht gerettet werden. In ihrem Inneren brodelt Ketzerei. Ich befehle hiermit die sofortige Zerstörung des gesamten Thassertiums und erkläre Exterminatus für den Planeten. Das Administratum erhält Zeit, seinen Besitz zu evakuieren, und danach wird Thassera durch Feuer gereinigt."
languages.original_text: "This world is beyond saving. Its very bowels exude heresy. I hereby order the immediate destruction of all thassertium, and declare Exterminatus on the planet. The Administratum will be given time to evacuate its property, after which, Thassera will be cleansed by fire."

traits.locale_text: "Diese Welt kann nicht gerettet werden. In ihrem Inneren brodelt Ketzerei. Ich befehle hiermit die sofortige Zerstörung des gesamten Thassertiums und erkläre Exterminatus für den Planeten. Das Administratum erhält Zeit, seinen Besitz zu evakuieren, und danach wird Thassera durch Feuer gereinigt."
"Auf diesem Planet darf kein Thassertim zurückbleiben. Das abgebaute Mineral und alle Vorkommen müssen zerstört werden."
